title: Operation 'Epic Failure': Is the Iran war backfiring on Trump?
content: While US and Israeli forces have inflicted significant damage on Iran's military and leadership, the conflict has escalated into a regional confrontation. Iran's strategy of prolonging the war and disrupting global markets poses a challenge to President Trump's ability to achieve a decisive political victory, raising concerns about the war's long-term consequences and potential for isolation.

title: Pakistan, China pose biggest nuclear threat to US, says Tulsi Gabbard
content: US intelligence chief Tulsi Gabbard identified Pakistan as a major nuclear threat, alongside Iran, China, Russia, and North Korea. These nations are developing advanced missile systems capable of reaching the US homeland.  Gabbard also noted North Korea's growing ties with Russia and China, while stating Iran's nuclear program was effectively halted last June.

title: Retirement soon? Buttler makes honest admission after poor T20 WC
content: Jos Buttler admitted he had a poor T20 World Cup, scoring just 87 runs, but remains determined to continue his England career. He said, "Obviously I had a poor tournament, which is disappointing," yet added he hopes to return to form. After taking a refreshing break in France, Buttler reflected, "It wasn’t for a lack of effort, it just didn't quite happen."

title: Nvidia’s Jensen Huang become first CEO to roll out token budgets for recruitment
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang proposed offering engineers annual "token budgets" as part of their compensation, potentially amounting to half their base salary. This move aims to boost engineer productivity and serve as a new recruiting tool in Silicon Valley. Huang believes this will amplify engineers' capabilities, making them significantly more effective.

title: Eid truce: Pakistan pauses Afghanistan operations after deadly Kabul strike
content: Pakistan has temporarily halted military operations against Afghanistan for Eid, following requests from Turkey, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar. This pause comes amid escalating border tensions after a deadly Kabul attack, which Pakistan claims targeted a site used for drone storage and training suicide bombers.

title: Trump suspends Jones Act for 60 days as Iran war drives up US fuel costs - what it means
content: In a bid to curb soaring energy costs, President Trump has temporarily waived the Jones Act for 60 days. This move permits foreign ships to transport goods between US ports, aiming to ease oil market disruptions caused by the US-Israeli conflict with Iran.

title: Sam Altman sends 'thanks note' to engineers with the message that 'we plan to take your job'
content: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman expressed gratitude to early software engineers, acknowledging their complex work. However, his comments sparked debate about AI's impact on coding jobs, with users interpreting his message as a prelude to displacement. This follows recent workforce reductions and AI investment announcements from companies like Block Inc. and Atlassian, signaling a broader trend of automation affecting white-collar roles.

title: 'Abusive relationship': Deve Gowda responds to Kharge's 'loved us, married Modiji' dig
content: Former Prime Minister HD Deve Gowda responded to Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge's remarks by calling his alliance with the Congress a "forced marriage" that ended in an "abusive relationship.

title: Rain lashes several parts of Delhi-NCR; thunderstorms, gusty winds likely this week, says IMD
content: Delhi-NCR experienced rainfall and gusty winds on Wednesday, causing a dip in temperatures and power outages. The India Meteorological Department forecasts continued light rain, thunderstorms, and strong winds until March 20, with temperatures expected to remain below normal. Residents are urged to take precautions during the adverse weather.

title: AFCON chaos: Senegal allege 'corruption' and reveal their next move
content: Senegal’s AFCON win has been overturned by Confederation of African Football, awarding the title to Morocco and sparking outrage. CAF cited rules after Senegal players briefly left the pitch during the final. Senegal has rejected the decision, alleged corruption, and will appeal to the Court of Arbitration for Sport, leaving the final outcome uncertain.

title: 'Ok if Gambhir wanted me, Kohli & Rohit out': Ashwin backs India coach's call
content: Ravichandran Ashwin explained his retirement decision, stating he wanted to leave on his own terms after feeling his time was up. He also backed head coach Gautam Gambhir, emphasizing that the coach has the right to make team-oriented decisions, even if it means senior players like himself, Kohli, or Rohit must move on.

title: Shikar Dhawan's Rs 5 crore South Delhi and Rs 69 crore Gurgaon homes; a peek into cricketer's lavish lifestyle
content: Cricketer Shikhar Dhawan, known as 'Gabbar,' has expanded his real estate portfolio beyond his ₹5 crore Delhi home. He recently acquired a lavish 6,040 sq ft apartment in Gurugram for a staggering ₹69 crore. Dhawan also previously owned a luxurious Australian mansion, which he later sold. His impressive car collection further highlights his affluence.

title: 'Working on new dates': China agreed to postpone Trump's Beijing visit, says White House
content: President Trump's planned visit to Beijing, initially scheduled for late March, has been postponed by approximately five to six weeks. White House officials confirmed the delay, citing ongoing communication with China regarding new dates. The postponement is attributed to the current focus on the war with Iran, which is significantly impacting US foreign policy and diverting administrative attention.

title: White House says Joe Kent was not involved in Iran operation talks
content: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt defended President Trump's Iran war decision, stating former NCTC chief Joe Kent was not involved in discussions. Leavitt asserted Trump has full confidence in DNI Tulsi Gabbard, countering Kent's claim of no imminent threat. She highlighted intelligence indicating Iran's nuclear ambitions and aggressive missile expansion, justifying the strikes.

title: US-Iran war: Is India’s Gulf remittance lifeline at risk? Billions at stake!
content: India continues to be the largest recipient of remittances in the world. India’s share in the world remittances stood at 14% in 2024. What does the current US-Iran war and the Middle East conflict mean for remittance flows to India? What is the dependence, macro importance?

title: PM Modi talks to Kuwait's Crown Prince; reiterates India's stand on regional peace
content: Prime Minister Modi conveyed Eid greetings to Kuwait's Crown Prince and condemned attacks on the nation's sovereignty amidst regional conflict. He emphasized India's priority on safe navigation through the Strait of Hormuz and discussed diplomatic solutions for peace. Similar concerns were raised with the UAE President, highlighting India's energy ties and diaspora welfare.

title: What if Koneru Humpy skips Women’s Candidates? Fine, replacement, and 'setback for India'
content: Indian chess star Koneru Humpy is uncertain about playing the Women’s Candidates in Cyprus due to Middle East tensions. She recently voiced concerns publicly. However, a final decision is yet to be taken. Her withdrawal could lead to fines and impact Indian chess. If she opts out, Ukraine's Anna Muzychuk may replace her in the tournament.

title: ‘Felt humiliated and suffocated’: After joining BJP, Pradyut Bordoloi slams Congress
content: Nagaon MP Pradyut Bordoloi has joined the BJP, citing persistent internal humiliation and lack of leadership support within the Congress. He expressed deep hurt over allegations of a criminal nexus against a candidate being dismissed as "fabricated" by a Congress leader.

title: 5 IPL legends who have never won the Purple Cap
content: Several IPL greats like Sunil Narine, Piyush Chawla, Ravichandran Ashwin, Jasprit Bumrah, and Ravindra Jadeja have taken plenty of wickets but never won the Purple Cap. Their focus on economy, control, and team roles often limits big wicket hauls, despite consistent performances over many seasons.

title: 'Finish off what's left in Iran?' Trump sends 'straight' message to 'non-responsive' allies
content: US President Donald Trump has sharply criticised allies for not backing Washington's military actions against Iran, questioning their commitment. He stated the US, as the world's most powerful nation, doesn't need assistance, despite earlier calls for help to secure the Strait of Hormuz. Many key allies have expressed reluctance to join offensive operations.

title: IPL 2026: Ishan Kishan to lead SRH, Abhishek Sharma also gets new role
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad have appointed Ishan Kishan as captain for the upcoming IPL season, with Abhishek Sharma as his deputy. This leadership change is in effect until regular captain Pat Cummins recovers from injury. Kishan, a dynamic wicketkeeper-batter, brings his explosive form and proven IPL record to the role, aiming to lead the franchise effectively during Cummins' absence.

title: 'We feel uncomfortable': Kangana Ranaut calls Rahul Gandhi 'tapori'
content: BJP MP Kangana Ranaut labeled Rahul Gandhi a "tapori," claiming women MPs feel uncomfortable around him due to his "rude" demeanor. This follows an open letter from retired bureaucrats and lawyers criticizing Gandhi's protest behavior as a "disregard for parliamentary authority" and "arrogance."

title: This child’s unusual drawing shocked her dad: Here’s what it teaches parents about kids’ minds
content: A father posted his child's whimsical drawing of him tumbling off a roof with a big grin, igniting lively discussions online. Art specialists point out that children's creative expressions often intertwine reality with imagination and emotion, seldom signaling distress. Parents are encouraged to engage in open dialogue with their kids, using these artworks as windows into their thoughts and feelings.

title: KKR's Cameron Green gets angry at reporter; interview ends with 'waste of time' remark
content: The incident took place outside Western Australia’s dressing room after the third day of the match on Monday. A report in The Age detailed the interaction with 'visibly annoyed' Green, stating that the interview began with a question about Green’s century for Western Australia against New South Wales.

title: Elias Pettersson hits 200th NHL goal in Canucks win over Panthers
content: Elias Pettersson had a milestone game, as he scored twice to hit his 200th goal in the NHL and enable the Vancouver Canucks to defeat the Florida Panthers in a decisive manner. His maturing legacy came into the limelight and helped in an eventual NHL match outcome in Vancouver.

title: Punjab to seek water royalty from Rajasthan; Mann claims Rs 1.44 lakh cr dues since 1960
content: Punjab's Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann has demanded royalty from Rajasthan for water supplied since 1960, citing a 1920 tripartite agreement. He claims Rajasthan owes Rs 1.44 lakh crore under this pact, which facilitated water flow through the Rajasthan feeder. Mann stated Punjab has formally written to Rajasthan and plans to involve the central government to resolve the unpaid dues.

title: Raghav Chadha proposes joint tax filing for married couples — here’s how it could work
content: Aam Aadmi Party MP Raghav Chadha proposed reforms to ease financial burdens, advocating for optional joint income tax filing for couples, full tax exemption on disability pensions for all wounded soldiers, and removal of bank minimum balance penalties. These proposals aim to create a fairer financial system for ordinary citizens amidst ongoing pensioner concerns.

title: 'Anxiety ho rahi thi': Shivam Dube explains why he took train after T20 World Cup win
content: Following India's T20 World Cup 2026 victory, Shivam Dube bypassed his flight to rush home to his family. He opted for an early morning train to Mumbai, traveling discreetly in a 3rd AC compartment. Dube's crucial contributions with bat and ball cemented his status as an impactful all-rounder in the triumphant campaign.

title: Helicopter overturns and crashes in eastern Nepal while landing, one injured—Watch
content: An Air Dynasty helicopter carrying a dead body and five passengers crashed while attempting to land in a field in Nepal's Khotang district. One passenger sustained injuries, while the pilot and other passengers were unharmed. High winds or dust during landing are suspected as contributing factors to the incident.

title: Takeaways from opening week of NFL free agency: Biggest signings, losses for all 32 teams
content: Let's break down the main free agency signings, latest buzz on moves and biggest remaining questions for every team.

title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts
content: We're following NFL free agency signings, trades, cuts, contract restructures and other moves as they happen.

title: Sources: New WNBA CBA includes $7M salary cap
content: After a prolonged labor battle, the WNBA and players' union have reached a verbal agreement on the terms for a new CBA. Sources told ESPN that the salary cap will start at $7 million and raise the average salary to around $600,000.

title: Sources: Dolphins star Achane off-limits in trade
content: The Dolphins have informed inquiring teams that De'Von Achane is not available in a trade, sources told ESPN.

title: Trucks driver parked for mocking IndyCar racer
content: NASCAR driver Daniel Dye has been suspended -- the second known major penalty of his racing career -- for mocking IndyCar driver David Malukas during a recent livestream.

title: Mark saves day, sends Texas to NCAA first round
content: Tramon Mark hit a fadeaway jumper from just inside the 3-point line with 1.1 seconds left, and Texas survived a late rally to beat NC State 68-66 on Tuesday night in a First Four matchup.

title: Other shoe drops: Caruso T'd up for desperate D
content: Thunder guard Alex Caruso was called for goaltending and a technical foul for an illegal defensive move after he swatted away a layup attempt with his shoe.

title: Tiger 'working,' but Masters status still unclear
content: Tiger Woods remained mum on his playing status for next month's Masters, telling reporters after the TGL semifinals that his health continues to be up and down.

title: U.S. laments another WBC loss as star offense lags
content: Team USA, boasting one of the most talented rosters ever assembled, failed to live up to its billing Tuesday night and could only watch as Venezuela celebrated its first World Baseball Classic championship.

title: Ex-reality TV star Holmes repeats Iditarod win
content: Former reality TV star Jessie Holmes cruised to a victory in the Iditarod, becoming the third competitor in the 54-year history of the race to repeat the year after winning for the first time.

title: 🏀 Giant Killers: Identifying men's tourney upsets
content: Which double-digit seeds have the highest potential to advance to the second round? Here's what ESPN's BPI says.

title: Ranking the top 50 men's college basketball players who could define March Madness
content: From mid-major leaders to national superstars, here's who could impact their teams' NCAA tournament runs.

title: 2026 men's NCAA tournament guide: How far will every team go?
content: ESPN's bracketologist shares what he really thinks about every team's chances in the NCAA tournament.

title: Even in Team USA defeat, the World Baseball Classic is a win for all of baseball
content: Denied gold by a Venezuelan team that symbolized the event at its best, Bryce Harper and the U.S. couldn't help but relish in the beauty of the WBC.

title: Biggest questions, projections and more: Storylines to watch ahead of NBA playoffs
content: Our NBA Insiders answer the biggest questions facing contenders in the East and West as the regular season winds to a close.

title: 15 Beers, booming NIL sales, not a sip of alcohol: The irony of Raegan Beers' viral jersey
content: Beers has never had alcohol, but she seized the opportunity to capitalize on her name when her jersey went viral.

content: Who are the top players in the women's NCAA bracket? Where do Azzi Fudd, Hannah Hidalgo and Lauren Betts rank?

content: One must-see guard scores from anywhere like Kelsey Plum. Another handles pressure like Chelsea Gray.

title: WNBA CBA negotiations: At last, WNBA and union 'aligned' on new CBA
content: The salary cap of the new CBA will reportedly start at $7 million, with the supermax salary starting at $1.4 million.

title: NHL playoff watch: Will the Penguins catch the Hurricanes?
content: Pittsburgh faces off against Carolina on Wednesday. Plus, full playoff projections, draft lottery standings after a busy Tuesday.

title: Champions League's most epic comebacks: Sporting join Barcelona, Liverpool among biggest revivals
content: Sporting became only the fifth club in Champions League history to win a two-legged knockout tie despite losing the first leg by three goals or more.

title: PSG show Chelsea what it takes to be truly part of Europe's elite
content: Tuesday's 3-0 defeat to PSG in the Champions League showed just how far off the pace the Blues really are.

title: Kiper's new NFL mock draft: How free agency shook up first-round landing spots for top prospects
content: Team needs have shifted in free agency, so how will top prospects come off the board in Round 1? Mel Kiper Jr. projects the NFL draft's first 32 picks.

title: Coaches predict the men's NCAA tournament champion, potential Cinderellas, more
content: There was one clear favorite among the 25 coaches polled. Here are their takes on seven contenders and more.

title: 60 ESPN personalities pick their men's Final Four, national champions
content: Sixteen teams are in the mix for our semifinal predictions, with one emerging as the clear title favorite.

title: 20 contenders, 20 lingering weaknesses: Barnwell fixes roster holes as free agency slows down
content: Will Aaron Rodgers check the QB box for the Steelers? Can the Seahawks find running back help? And is there something the Chiefs can do at cornerback?

title: As Premier League sides crumble around them, Arsenal keep cruising closer to a quadruple
content: Arsenal should feel the pressure as Premier League leaders. Instead, they look comfortable as a quadruple is in their sights.

title: Jackson Chourio, Roman Anthony among must-draft players in fantasy baseball
content: Which players are Tristan H. Cockcroft higher on than most? Here's a list of 20 names to keep in mind when drafting your 2026 rosters.

title: Men's tournament: Best bets for the round of 64, plus Eliminator picks
content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the first round, plus picks for the new Eliminator game.

title: In final window before World Cup, Pochettino's USMNT roster shows softened stance on club form
content: Mauricio Pochettino once demanded peak club performance from his USMNT players, but his March squad raises the question of whether that's negotiable.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Man United want Wolves' João Gomes
content: Wolves midfielder João Gomes is a target for Liverpool and Manchester United. Join us for the latest transfer news and rumors from around the globe.

title: 'I salute every boxer out there' -- Lamar Jackson boxes in offseason workout
content: Jackson is looking to bounce back after a hamstring injury which saw him play in only 13 games last season.

title: Women's boxing pound-for-pound rankings: Gabriela Fundora's dominance fuels her rise
content: Gabriela Fundora delivers another KO to break into the top three. Here are the latest women's pound-for-pound rankings.

title: Big Details Emerge After US Mercenary Matthew VanDyke's Arrest In India
content: The arrest of an American national in India has uncovered several crucial leads in a high-level investigation encompassing national security angles.

title: Religious Trust's Accounts Frozen Over Foreign Funding, Irregularities
content: The Anti Terrorism Squad (ATS) has taken action against an organisation named Gulzar-E-Raza Trust, freezing its bank accounts over suspected foreign funding and financial irregularities.

title: 'Abusive Relationship, Had To Divorce': HD Deve Gowda On M Kharge Remark
content: The "marriage" with the Congress in 2019 was an "abusive relationship" and so it ended in divorce, former Prime Minister and Janata Dal Secular chief HD Deve Gowda said today, responding to Mallikarjun Kharge's jest in Rajya Sabha.

title: Poll Body Reshuffles 18 Senior Officers In Bengal Ahead Of Assembly Elections
content: The Election Commission on Wednesday ordered a fresh round of reshuffle of senior officers in poll-bound West Bengal, appointing 13 IAS officers as DMs-cum-DEOs and posting five IPS officers as deputy inspectors general (DIGs).

title: Supreme Leader Away From Public Eye, Brass Killed: Who Is Running Iran?
content: Seventeen days after Israel killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, the country's power structure has been hit by another wave of high-profile assassinations.

title: Karnataka Tables Bill To Uphold Right Of Adults To Choose Their Partners
content: The Karnataka government has introduced The Karnataka Freedom of Choice in Marriage and Prevention and Prohibition of Crimes in the Name of Honour and Tradition (Eva Nammava Eva Nammava) Bill, 2026 in the Legislative Assembly on Wednesday.

title: "Unfortunate": Gaurav Gogoi On MP Pradyut Bordoloi Joining BJP
content: Assam Pradesh Congress Committee (APCC) president Gaurav Gogoi, on Wednesday, called the resignation of senior Congress leader and Nagaon Lok Sabha MP Pradyut Bordoloi "unfortunate".

title: March 31 Eradication Deadline Nears, Battles To End Maoism Intensify
content: Over the past two years, the Centre has pushed an aggressive, mission-mode strategy to wipe out Maoists, once described by Amit Shah as the "biggest threat to India's internal security."

title: 'Who Will Certify?' Row Over 'Sanatan Affidavit' Demand For Sara Ali Khan
content: Non-Hindus will have to submit an affidavit swearing faith to 'Sanatan' before they can pray at Badrinath and Kedarnath shrines, saidBadrinath-Kedarnath Temple Committee (BKTC) chairman Hemant Dwivedi.

title: Man Kills Brother Over "Inappropriate Gaze" At Wife In UP's Mathura
content: A man allegedly hacked his younger brother to death with a sharp-edged weapon for "casting an inappropriate gaze at his wife", police said on Wednesday.

title: Not Just IT, Other Ministries May Soon Get Powers On Social Media Blocking
content: An inter-ministerial team is working on a proposal to allow multiple government ministries to issue blocking orders to social media platforms for fake or harmful content.

title: Iran's Stance On Nuclear Weapon Development Is Unchanged Says Foreign Minister
content: Iran's stance against the development of nuclear weapons won't significantly change, Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi told Al Jazeera.

title: Chinese University Tells Students To 'Fall In Love' During Spring Break
content: A Chinese university is urging students to "enjoy the flowers, fall in love" during their mid-term break, an unusual directive in a nation obsessed with getting good grades, as authorities seek new ways to spur marriages and domestic consumption.

title: Larijani's Visit To Daughter's House Sealed His Fate. How He Was Located
content: Iran's security chief Ali Larijani's killing deals a major blow to Tehran's power structure as it retaliates to US-Israeli attacks amid a war that has pushed the Middle East into fresh chaos.

title: Israeli Journalist Gets Death Threats After Reporting Missile Strike
content: On Polymarket, a prediction market, users had wagered millions on whether a missile would hit Israel on March 10.

title: 2.6 Lakh People Returned To India From Middle East Since Feb 28: Foreign Ministry
content: Amid the escalating West Asia conflict, the government on Wednesday said around 2.6 lakh people have returned from the region to India since February 28.

title: 9 Killed, Including 3 Children, In Fire At Building In Delhi's Palam
content: Nine people, including three children, were killed after a fire broke out in a residential building in southwest Delhi's Palam area on Wednesday morning, officials said.

title: Chinese Woman Hospitalised After Being Startled By Humanoid Robot
content: A woman on an evening walk in Macau was briefly hospitalised after a humanoid robot startled her and left her feeling unwell, police told AFP on Wednesday.

title: Iraq Restarts Oil Exports Via Turkey Amid Strait Of Hormuz Disruptions
content: Iraq announced on Wednesday it had resumed limited oil exports of 250,000 bpd through the Turkish port of Ceyhan after the country's output plunged due to disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: District gears up for another flawless Thrissur Pooram
content: Collector chairs high-level review meeting; round-the-clock control rooms, safety, and crowd management take centre stage

title: Food and Civil Supplies Minister asks hotels to adjust operations for a week amid LPG shortage
content: We have barely about 1,000 cylinders for commercial use; it is difficult to decide how to distribute these, K.H. Muniyappa says

title: Kerala revises grace marks for students
content: Order does not mention grace marks for reading, as announced earlier by Minister for General Education V. Sivankutty

title: House panel flags vacancies in UGC, AICTE, says situation ‘critical’
content: The panel said “516 out of 763 sanctioned non-teaching positions are vacant”, amounting to a vacancy rate of 67.6%; 63.6% of posts in middle and senior administrative levels were vacant in AICTE

title: Luggage deposit, delivery centres come in handy for deveotees in Tirumala
content: 80 counters are operational in Tirumala and along the pedestrian pathways, manned by 394 personnel working in three shifts to provide round-the-clock services

title: Government urged to address issues faced by shrimp farmers
content: Andhra Pradesh Farmers Association raise concerns over the rising cost of feed and the declining prices of shrimp

title: HRD Minister Lokesh promises job calendar every Ugadi
content: Insisting on a structured approach to employment generation, the HRD Minister asserts that large-scale employment will also come through the private sector investment, with efforts underway to attract multiple companies to Andhra Pradesh

title: In the Rajya Sabha, BJP MP calls for implementing OBC sub-quota for Central schemes
content: Sub-categorisation of OBCs has been carried out by various State governments for a while now, and recognises the graded backwardness of communities within a given categorisation

title: Kerala HC rejects PIL that challenged use of name ‘IPL’
content: Court observes that there was no merit in the substance of the argument and refuses to entertain the PIL

title: Iran war leads to drop in cargo volumes in Kerala ports
content: Cochin Port, only port in Kerala that handles crude oil and liquefied petroleum gas consignments, has witnessed a 20-30% drop in cargo volumes since the conflict began

title: Meta moves Delhi HC against CCPA fine for walkie-talkie sale on Facebook
content: It argued that the Central Consumer Protection Authority had no jurisdiction over it as Facebook was not an e-commerce platform but only a notice board

title: Amaravati allocates land for 109 institutions to boost capital development
content: Education sector receives the largest share of land, with 18 institutions allotted approximately 838.66 acres

title: Andhra Pradesh High Court reserves judgment on former MLA’s plea to transfer Amaravati IRR case to CBI
content: Chandrababu Naidu is one of the prime accused in the case; Judge reserves verdict in two other petitions, including one seeking cancellation of interim bail given to Naidu

title: Downpour, gusty winds damage 45 power poles in Yadgir district
content: There was heavy rainfall in several rural pockets of the district on Wednesday afternoon too, causing additional worry to farmers

title: Eva Nammava, Eva Nammava Bill tabled; seeks to prevent ‘honour’ killings, caste-based crimes
content: The proposed law ensures a minimum of five years of imprisonment in cases where a person or couple is killed in the name of ‘honour’.

title: Vacancies, rising backlog, non-transparency weaken consumer dispute redressal system in India: report
content: Case pendency has risen steeply between 2020 and 2024 by 21%, with the number of cases increasing to more than 5.15 lakh from around 88,000. This far exceeds the timelines prescribed under the Consumer Protection Act, 2019, which mandates disposal within three to five months.

title: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu describes the Polavaram-displaced as partners in development
content: The Chief Minister disburses ₹226.61 crore as part of the third phase of compensation under the Rehabilitation and Resettlement package, asserts that the government is committed to ensuring a new beginning for those who have borne the cost of progress

title: Students welcomed with flowers, chocolates as SSLC exam begins
content: Smooth start to exam in the districts of Dharwad, Haveri, Gadag and Uttara Kannada with no case of malpractice reported on the first day

title: 'Legal profession tainted by hooliganism': Supreme Court slams lawyers in U.P. toll plaza case
content: The apex court said denial of bail to the accused and the curtailment of their liberty for a period exceeding two months is absolutely unjustified and violative of the Fundamental Right of Liberty

title: ‘Smart Street Vending Market’ to come up soon in Ongole
content: The project, envisaging 100 shops in 25 containers, is likely to help local women SHGs and street vendors improve their livelihoods

title: 17 killed in Delhi, Indore blazes; major fires reported in Ahmedabad, Chandigarh
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi expressed deep sorrow over the two fire incidents and announced an ex gratia of ₹2 lakh from the PM National Relief Fund for the next of kin of each deceased and ₹50,000 for those injured

title: TVK chief Vijay rules out alliances, says ‘no compromise on secular social justice principles’
content: “Rumours were being spread that we were part of this team and that team. There is no such team. We belong only to the people’s team,” Mr. Vijay said.

title: 15,821 SSLC students write first language paper in Yadgir
content: Smooth start to SSLC examination at 61 centres across the district with 97.03% of students appearing for it on the first day

title: Kathua rape-murder convict ‘doesn’t deserve concession’, says Punjab and Haryana HC
content: A division bench of Justices Gurvinder Singh Gill and Ramesh Kumari passed the order on Sanji Ram's plea on the concession of suspension of sentence

title: Government urged to identify remaining HIV cases in A.P. by December 1
content: Goal is to transform the country into ‘Suraksha India’ by controlling the spread of HIV, and this can be done when State governments and Union Territories collectively work towards identifying people living with HIV, says National AIDS Control Organisation official

title: PM condoles deaths in fire incidents in Indore, Delhi; announces ex gratia
content: PM Modi said that for the fire incidents in Indore and Palam, Delhi, an ex-gratia of ₹2 lakh from PMNRF would be given to the next of kin of each deceased; the injured would be given ₹50,000

title: Dredging in limbo at Beypore port amid delay in EIA
content: The harbour development initiative, launched three years ago under a ₹11.8-crore contract awarded by the Kerala Maritime Board, had been suspended after dredgers encountered hard laterite rock on the seabed

title: Action will be taken after legal opinion on ‘waqf’ RTC entries without documents: Revenue Minister
content: Krishna Byre Gowda says several properties have been recorded as waqf in Record of Rights, Tenancy and Crops without backing documents such as sale deeds, gift deeds, registration papers or grant orders; these include 21.21 acres of government land and 3,903.11 acres of private land in Bengaluru.

title: 99.35% of Sakala services delivered within deadline, auto-mutation covers 98%: Krishna Byre Gowda
content: The Revenue Minister says reforms introduced over the past two-and-a-half years had streamlined services at Nada Kacheris and tahsildar offices.

title: Commercial advertisement hoardings to be banned near heritage structures
content: Urban Development Minister Byrathi Suresh says that over the past seven to eight years, thousands of unauthorised advertisements had come up across the State without payment of any fee or tax to local bodies, resulting in significant revenue losses running into hundreds of crores.

title: Rare hailstorm lashes Shivamogga
content: Within minutes, the sound of rain gave way to the rattle of ice pebbles striking metal rooftops and windshields

title: CPI slams govt. over move to weaken Higher Education Council
content: Diluting its authority can open the door for increased control by private and corporate institutions and allow substandard institutions to operate, warns party State secretary Eswaraiah

title: Tamil Nadu poll | How a government contract cost a Congress MLA his election: a lesson for 2026 candidates
content: The victory of P. Veldurai, the Congress candidate, was overturned five years later, not because of voter fraud or malpractice at the booth, but due to a legal disqualification

title: Fresh debate over GTD’s future in JD(S)
content: G.T. Deve Gowda says he will consult the people of the Chamundeshwari constituency if the party rejects his application for a ticket

title: BMTC to roll out smart ticketing system with 11,000 digital ETM devices
content: The long-awaited upgrade will replace existing fare collection methods with smart electronic ticketing machines (ETMs), aimed at improving efficiency and commuter convenience, according to BMTC officials

title: How delayed civic polls choked Bengaluru’s air quality?
content: Civic polls in Bengaluru were last held in 2015, and councillors’ terms ended in 2020. As a result, the BBMP missed out on securing ₹1,475.90 crore under the 15th Finance Commission’s million-plus cities challenge, which could have been used to address the rising levels of PM10) in the city.

title: Minister urged to address ‘medicine shortage’ in government hospitals, PHCs

title: Uncleared waste dumped at street corners, vacant sites posing health hazards in Yadgir

title: Barack Obama, Anthony Edwards shoot hoops, talk trash in Presidential Center opening tease
content: the video teasing the opening of the Obama Presidential Center is a new chapter to their relationship . former president Barack Obama says he's busy, and the person who is texting him responds with: "u scared" the two compete in basketball, ping-pong and Connect 4 .

title: ESPN's final points-league mock draft for 2026
content: Default rosters include seven starters along with a C, 1B, 2B, 3B, SS, three outfielders and a utility player . hitters score one point for every base reached via hits (total bases), as well as each walk, run, RBI and stolen base .

title: Will Ferrell named as a Los Angeles World Cup host ambassador
content: the 2026 world cup community in los Angeles will be in good hands courtesy of the newest host ambassadors . will Ferrell will join 1999 women's world cup champions Julie Foudy . the host committee announced that he will be the community ambassador for the event .

title: Women's tournament odds: UConn odds-on favorite; UCLA, Texas, South Carolina next

title: Broncos are all-in, and Dolphins are all-out, but does either strategy make sense?
